items.caption: An isolated, flat stock illustration of a cafe window with a white background. the window is framed with a pink border and features a striped aquamarine canopy above. the word "cafe" is prominently displayed in white capital letters on the canopy. the window is adorned with a string of warm, glowing lights that add a festive touch. the overall color palette is soft and pastel, giving the image a calm and inviting atmosphere.
